problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Aerogel. Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
